programme.title: The Churchills
programme.desc: Historian David Starkey profiles two of Britain's greatest wartime leaders. He begins by revealing how Winston Churchill came to write a biography of his ancestor John, who led the nation against Louis XIV of France. Starkey also explores how preparations for the Second World War were affected by the prime minister's knowledge of his 17th-century forebear's achievements(n)

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson embarks on an expedition along Dorset's Jurassic coast to explore the county's hidden Second World War story. Starting beside the defences on Chesil Beach, he heads east to finish in Swanage and Studland Bay. On his five-day walk he encounters stunning scenery and uncovers wartime acts of ingenuity and bravery. He also discovers the crucial part a swannery played in developing a secret weapon and reveals the role of Dorset in protecting Britain from invasion during the conflict(n)

programme.title: Time Team
programme.desc: Tony Robinson and the team search for the remains of a Norman castle in Dundrum, Co Down, one of Northern Ireland's most picturesque counties, exploring a territory established by renegade knight John de Courcy in the 12th century against the orders of King John. The castle was later rebuilt, and much of its replacement is still standing, but the experts are convinced that some of what remains dates from de Courcy's time - and discover that it may go back even further(n)

programme.title: Time Team
programme.desc: Tony Robinson and the team embark on their 200th dig, examining the bed of a reservoir in a valley high up on Dartmoor in Devon. The specially drained site presents difficulties with its abundance of thick mud, but the archaeological experts uncover a network of monuments that suggests the existence of a major prehistoric site. Their efforts are further rewarded with the discovery of the first stone henge in Britain for a century(n)

programme.title: Inside Hitler's Killing Machine
programme.desc: Documentary about the Holocaust and some of the key figures involved, beginning with Hjalmar Schacht, who was never a Nazi but played a vital role in Hitler's plans(n)

programme.title: World War Weird
programme.desc: Unexplained events during wartime, including German submarines that discovered previously unknown sea creatures and a Japanese bomb that floated on the jet stream(n)

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: A town in West Virginia that fell victim to the pace of change when steam trains became obsolete and an underground complex in Italy that had been abandoned for nearly 2,000 years(n)

programme.title: Operation Gold Rush with Dan Snow
programme.desc: The historian follows in the footsteps of 19th-century gold prospectors, attempting to find riches in a remote region on the edge of the Canadian arctic. He is joined on his expedition by polar explorer Felicity Aston and physiologist Dr Kevin Fong. The first challenge of the trek is to cross Alaska's Coast Mountains, where they retrace two routes set by 19th-century miners and brave icy rivers, avalanche-prone slopes and near vertical ascents(n)

programme.title: Queen Elizabeth's Secret Agents
programme.desc: Documentary featuring dramatic reconstructions and interviews with historians to examine the network of spymasters and secret agents that helped protect Elizabeth I from assassination, terror and treason for more than 40 years. The first edition reveals how the pope's declaration of Elizabeth as a heretic 12 years into her reign set England's Catholics against her, leading the queen to charge William Cecil with the task of stopping assassins getting through, and the huge espionage network he established saw his spies break Catholic conspiracies at home and abroad(n)

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Laurence Olivier narrates an account of the liberation of Paris and Brussels in 1944, events which to many signified the end of the war. However, as the German forces retreated, Poland fell victim to one of the most tragic events of the war, Documentary chronicling the Second World War(n)

programme.title: Porridge

Fourteen-year-old Eduard is rushed in after falling from a swing and fracturing his ankle, while 62-year-old Rosina is treated having broken her wrist on the dancefloor at a family party. Paula is in Resus having been unable to take in food through her feeding tube and it is not only her health that is in danger, but also that of her unborn baby(n)

programme.title: What Makes a Murderer
programme.desc: Convicted murderers submit themselves to biological and psychological investigations to determine whether they truly had control over their actions. First up is 71-year-old John Massey, Britain's longest-serving murderer, who spent 43 years in prison for the fatal shooting of a nightclub bouncer in 1975. Neurocriminologist Professor Adrian Raine looks for biological causes of his aggressive, risk-taking and psychopathic behaviour, and forensic psychologist Dr Vicky Thakordas-Desai takes him back in time to his most painful childhood experiences(n)

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Poodle cross Wally is struggling to find a forever home, having spent a year in the centre during which time he has had four unsuccessful attempts. But the staff remain confident someone will come along who is able to handle his tricky behaviour. Meanwhile, bichon frise Bruce is looking for a quiet home and a comfy lap. Will he find that with Janet from Sheffield, who wants a well-behaved dog to keep her company after the death of her husband?(n)

programme.title: Guy Martin: World's Fastest Tractor
programme.desc: Guy embarks on his latest speed challenge, as he tries to become the first person to drive a tractor at more than 100mph, at Elvington Airfield near York. Jamie and Georgi host next and go all out with their fancy food - but are convinced JP and Kayley are out to sabotage their dishes. programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away

With a total of £650,000 to spend, and three shots each to find the perfect property - Laura in Berkshire and Jonnie in the ski-resort of Morzine - the pressure is really on for both of them to deliver(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Nashville, Tennessee, the spiritual home of country music, but his visit begins on a sour note at Chappy's Cajun restaurant. Chef John Chapman's careless methods have damaged his reputation, but he blames the local clientele rather than his less-than-appetising food and disturbing kitchen practices. Can Gordon get through to this stubborn owner and save the eatery from disaster?(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Scottsdale, Arizona, where he meets husband-and-wife bistro owners Samy and Amy Bouzaglo, who reveal a shocking contempt for customer feedback. The chef faces the biggest challenge of the series to save Amy's Baking Company, but can he get through to this defiant pair?(n)

programme.title: Boeing's Killer Plane: What Went Wrong?
programme.desc: Unravelling the events that led to two modern passenger jets falling out of the sky, and why the story of the fastest-selling aircraft in Boeing's history ended in tragedy. On 29 October 2018, Lion Air Flight 610 crashed into the Java Sea, and all 189 people on board died. Less than five months later, on 10 March 2019, an Ethiopian Airlines 737 MAX also crashed, and the 157 people on board were all killed. The documentary examines the crash reports to explore how these catastrophes could have been avoided, using state-of-the-art flight simulation and vivid CGI sequences to chart the flights' final moment(n)

programme.title: What Makes a Murderer
programme.desc: Convicted murderers submit themselves to biological and psychological investigations to determine whether they truly had control over their actions. First up is 71-year-old John Massey, Britain's longest-serving murderer, who spent 43 years in prison for the fatal shooting of a nightclub bouncer in 1975. Neurocriminologist Professor Adrian Raine looks for biological causes of his aggressive, risk-taking and psychopathic behaviour, and forensic psychologist Dr Vicky Thakordas-Desai takes him back in time to his most painful childhood experiences(n)

programme.title: Great British Car Journeys
programme.desc: All Creatures Great and Small stars Christopher Timothy and Peter Davison conclude their series of vintage road trips by travelling into the Rhondda Valley, across the Brecon Beacons, and finally into Snowdonia in their classic 1930s Morgan 4/4. Along the course of their Welsh odyssey, they discover the origins of the AA, which prove far more subversive than expected, recreate a vintage speed trap, and hitch a lift to the top of the world's biggest slate mine, before catching up with one of Christopher's oldest friends(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Following Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree as they restore a French chateau that has stood empty for 40 years(n)

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: A look back at Timothy West and Prunella Scales' waterway travels in Lancashire and Yorkshire - including the Rochdale Canal and the Leeds and Liverpool Canal. The pair also reminisce about the Lancaster canal, which led Pru back to her roots as she visited the village of Near Sawrey, where her family lived during much of the Second World War and which had another very famous resident - Beatrix Potter(n)

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Collie cross puppy Joey is a popular dog around the kennels, and has been a reliable buddy for the anxious dogs - but will he prove the same support to Holly, Adam and their son Oscar? Toy poodle Gizmo tries to overcome his social anxieties to win the hearts of Fiona and Maisie, a mother and daughter coming to terms with their future separation, and a lurcher with a broken tail requires lots of care - and with any luck, a forever home(n)

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George Clarke helps unlock the potential of two houses in south London. He begins by helping NHS theatre nurse Hannah, whose Edwardian worker's cottage in Thornton Heath is so small she has had to give the only decent bedroom to her two children while she sleeps in the front room. Can he provide the luxurious master bedroom she needs? George also helps a couple renovate their Streatham home, which would not be so bad if not for the previous owners' love of glass chandeliers, Roman columns and marble-effect tiles(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Bristol, furniture salesman Richard, teacher Anne, paramedic Harriet and IT architect Steve try to outdo each other by throwing the perfect dinner party. As the week progresses, Anne barks at Harriet and recites erotica, while Harriet's ditsy one-liners are a constant amusement for the table. The host on the final night has just one aim - to beat Richard after his restaurant quality meal on night one. In an episode of extreme highs and ravaging lows, expectations are crushed, hidden depths are revealed and criticisms are levelled as the quartet vie for the £1000 prize(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge demonstrates how he maintains his land on his trusty tractor, while three sisters raised in the UK travel to France in search of the perfect chateau(n)

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Greg Scott, CEO of clothing retailer New York & Company, disguises himself to go undercover among his own employees seeking ways to keep the business in vogue and increase profitability. He meets up with a sales associate, a fitting room stylist, a stocker and an assistant manager(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to floundering soul food restaurant Blackberry's in Plainfield, New Jersey, but struggles to get his message across to indomitable owner Shelley. Her refusal to deal with the truth comes to a head when Gordon finds a dead mouse in the doorway, prompting him to step up his efforts to change her ways(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: A psychotherapist arrives to interview Debra for a book on the American family, but finds the rest of the household far more captivating, leaving the humble housewife feeling left out(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: The Barones reminisce about more peaceful times in their first apartment and recall why they ended up living across the road from Ray's meddlesome parents(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles hires a new lawyer to represent him in his divorce case when Maris tries to postpone the settlement. However, the attorney warns him that his unrequited passion for Daphne could harm his chances in court - and so could Frasier's inability to lie(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles plans a holiday at his newly acquired cabin to get over the shock of Daphne's blossoming romance with Donny, and later joins forces with a lovelorn Roz to end the couple's relationship. Comedy, with David Hyde Pierce(n)

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Christmas

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Dagmar the giraffe is supporting her closest herd member Orla, whose new calf is overdue - but at the same time she is reluctant to allow her own youngest to feed properly. So the keepers plan a herd birth in the hope that both mothers can learn from each other. There is concern when two of the spider monkeys withdraw from their family, while two devoted camels experience the trauma of separation when one undergoes an operation(n)

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door

programme.desc: Grady prepares for his wedding day, but the event is marred by an untimely death with a connection to his father-in-law's estate. With Jessica among the guests, it is not long before the culprit is taken into custody. Angela Lansbury stars(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica attends a high-class New York party where she meets a womanising gambler who is leading a double life in the seemingly quaint and old-fashioned recesses of Cabot Cove. Starring Angela Lansbury and Mel Ferrer(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: An old friend of Jessica's dies and the heir to a fortune, who has been missing for more than 20 years, makes a sudden reappearance. Angela Lansbury stars as the sleuthing crime writer(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A missing shoe discovered on the dead body of a homeless person leads Jessica to believe that the supposed accidental death was actually intentional. She poses as a wealthy widow to investigate the case of an accountant who apparently died as a result of alcoholism. Dirk Benedict guest stars alongside Angela Lansbury(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Fade Into Murder (1976)
programme.desc: An actor who plays a detective on a soap opera is being blackmailed by his ex-lover, who is also his producer. Convinced that playing a sleuth makes him clever enough to get away with murder, he kills her and frames her husband - but has reckoned without the intervention of the crumpled cop. Crime drama, with Peter Falk and William Shatner(n)

programme.title: Columbo Goes to College (1991)
programme.desc: Two criminology students murder their professor and cover their tracks with false clues. They think they are on the way to outwitting everyone - but find themselves at the bottom of the class when Columbo intervenes. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Stephen Caffrey, Gary Hershberger and Robert Culp(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The first instalment of a two-part crossover with NCIS: New Orleans sees the Washington, DC team co-operating with their colleagues from the Big Easy to investigate a spate of lethal poisonings on board a New Orleans-to-DC flight. All the evidence seems to point to missing chef Luca, who happens to be Abby's brother, so the two investigative services join forces to locate him, and find out why a private tech firm seems to have been targetted by the killer. Naval crime drama, guest starring Scott Bakula(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team suspects foul play when a seaman who was set to testify before a grand jury dies before he can make his court appearance. When it becomes clear the man was murdered, the subsequent investigation reveals that a previously thwarted human-trafficking ring has been re-established. Meanwhile, a storm causes a massive power outage, and McGee seeks a room for the night among his colleagues. Naval crime drama, starring Sean Murray(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler investigate the disappearance of a Chinese woman and her daughter, and uncover a conspiracy involving women smuggled into the country by gangsters running a prostitution ring. Crime drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the rape of a teenage TV personality whose raunchy antics on and off camera had made her unpopular within the community. As events unfold, they are shocked to discover her suspected attacker may have been acting on the suggestion of a controversial DJ who had been baiting the star over the airwaves(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The detectives are taunted by a serial killer who leaves clues about his next targets scattered around the city. Suspecting the perpetrator is emulating the crimes of a murderer active in the 1970s, they visit the one surviving victim of the original, a woman who was recently quizzed about the case by a reporter(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler arrest a psychiatrist who has taken the law into his own hands and avenged his young son's death at the hands of another child. The case against him seems open and shut - but he mounts a clever defence, using his professional expertise in a bid to escape punishment. With guest star Kyle MacLachlan(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. A military aircraft transporting the bodies of US Marines back home crashes before reaching its destination, and Gibbs and the team are called in to help identify human remains at the site of the wreckage. However, a DNA discrepancy turns a routine investigation into a search for a missing person. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: American social worker Sarah Goode is taken hostage by militants in northern Syria, and thanks to the efforts of the Navy Seals, is eventually returned home unharmed. Evidence from the incident suggests US citizen Kyle Nasry was connected to the kidnapping, but when the agents trace Nasry to a rally held by a controversial imam, they are surprised to find Sarah among the attendees. Meanwhile, DiNozzo finally takes his relationship with Zoe Keates public - surprising none of his colleagues. Starring Mark Harmon, Michael Weatherly and Pauley Perrette(n)

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. programme.desc: A stage magician has kept the fact that he is a Nazi war criminal a secret for years. When a nightclub manager threatens to expose him, the illusionist kills him and arranges the perfect alibi - because at the time of the murder, he was apparently performing an escapology act. However, Columbo sets out to uncover the truth. Detective drama, with Peter Falk and Jack Cassidy(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Double Exposure (1973)
programme.desc: A maker of motivational films based on subliminal messages uses his expertise to plant a subconscious command in the mind of a rival to lure him to his death. However, any hopes of his getting away with it are dashed by the arrival of a certain shabby sleuth. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Robert Culp, Robert Middleton, Louise Latham and Arlene Martel(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A deep-sea diver is murdered on the job, and his co-workers all become suspects. However, when they return to the surface, they must remain in a high-tech decompression chamber for four days. With each of their suspects confined within a tank, the NCIS team must complete an unorthodox investigation from the outside. Starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Pauley Perrette(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Sarah Porter, the Secretary of the Navy, learns her daughter has been kidnapped, and the NCIS crew teams up with the FBI to track the case, determine a motive and bring the abducted girl home. Meanwhile, McGee's childhood friend, NCIS Special Agent Valerie Page, arrives in town to assist with advanced tactics training. Naval crime drama, guest starring Leslie Hope and Christina Chang(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Logan and Barek investigate a troubled teenager after his parents are found murdered in their suburban home. They are convinced the youngster is innocent - even though he confesses to the crime. Meanwhile, Deakins spends his last two weeks on the job preparing for his future(n)

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Kensi and Deeks investigate when a radical terrorist organisation notorious for orchestrating a series of bombings in the 1970s seems to have re-emerged. When one of the group's fugitive members is found stabbed, the pair's search for answers leads them to a dangerously secluded woodland area. Crime drama, starring Daniela Ruah, Eric Christian Olsen and Chris O'Donnell(n)

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Sam agrees to help an old friend whose nephew has been kidnapped, and although Granger and Hetty forbid him from investigating the case in company time, they soon change their minds when they discover the culprit is Haakim 'the Ambassador' Hamami, a wanted terrorist with connections to the Taliban. programme.desc: A day spent working on a cut-and-dried case leaves the team free to spend some time away from work, and while McGee and Delilah argue over the importance of keeping shop-talk to a minimum, DiNozzo ends up boring his dinner date with crime-solving tales. Detective drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio, Kathryn Erbe and Jamey Sheridan(n)

Joan and John do their best, but Nick Knowles believes they deserve better, so he and his small band of builders - bolstered by an army of local tradespeople - set out to extend the Findlays' home, with designer Oliver Heath on hand to protect his vision. programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness some of the best and worst behaviour on the nation's motorways. The series focuses on Auckland, the country's largest urban area, and features motoring chaos including major traffic collisions, escaped animals and pedestrians on busy roads. There is also footage of drivers falling asleep at the wheel, overloaded vehicles and suspects caught with illegal substances - plus a host of excuses as the people pulled over try to persuade officers they have not done anything wrong(n)

programme.title: How to Stay Young
programme.desc: First of a two-part documentary in which Angela Rippon and Dr Chris van Tulleken investigate the latest experiments and research that could help put the brakes on the ageing process. The first programme focuses on the physical aspects, revealing how much is down to how people live their lives and how people's lifestyle choices can help combat the effects of ageing. Chris finds out how public attitudes to the elderly can have a negative impact, spending a day as an 80-year-old with the help of Hollywood-style prosthetics, and Angela visits a study in Germany comparing the benefits of dancing with conventional gym exercises(n)

programme.title: The Dark Charisma of Adolf Hitler
programme.desc: Laurence Rees looks at the peak of the dictator's popularity in Germany throughout the 1930s and his decision to invade France in 1940. In Nuremburg, hundreds of thousands gathered to pay homage, filling the streets in celebration of a leader who had convinced them they were a superior race and would accomplish great things. During this time Hitler faced his greatest test yet as he wanted to gain a vast new empire, but had to persuade his people to maintain their faith in him and embrace war(n)

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld

programme.title: Reservoir Dogs (1992)
programme.desc: Criminals are employed by a crime boss to carry out a diamond robbery that goes disastrously wrong. In the bloody aftermath of the heist, they try to establish what happened and how the police were aware of their plans all along - leading to the hardening suspicion that one of them betrayed the gang. Quentin Tarantino's thriller, starring Harvey Keitel, Tim Roth, Michael Madsen, Chris Penn and Steve Buscemi(n)

programme.title: Britain's Biggest Primary School
programme.desc: One-off edition of the documentary charting life at Gascoigne Primary School in Barking, east London, this time during the hectic build-up to Christmas. The pupils of Year 2 have been given the challenge of putting on the nativity play, while kitchen manager Mary has the unenviable job of preparing for the biggest meal of the year for nearly a thousand hungry children, with a wide variety of cultural and dietary requirements to be satisfied. Teachers try to improve the lot of 10-year-old Taylor, who fears almost everything about the big school and newly qualified teacher James struggles to help seven-year-old Faisal, the only child at Gascoigne with Down's syndrome(n)

programme.title: Worlds Apart with Oksana Boyko
programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. programme.title: Heineken Champions Cup Rugby Union
programme.desc: Saracens v Ospreys (Kick-off 1.00pm). Lee McKenzie presents coverage of both sides' second Pool Four fixture, which takes place at Allianz Park. The defending champions - who were recently docked 35 Premiership points and handed a £5.36million fine for breaching salary cap rules - last met the Welsh side in January 2018, when a tense encounter finished 15-15. Owen Farrell's five penalties were cancelled out by five from Ospreys playmaker Dan Biggar on that occasion, with no tries scored in the game. With analysis from Gareth Anscombe, reports by Ed Jackson and commentary from Miles Harrison, Jamie Heaslip and Nolli Waterman(n)

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe encounters a suicidal office worker during her first day as a telemarketer. Ross and Monica are upset to discover their parents intend to sell their childhood home, while Rachel and Chandler blame themselves for breaking Joey's favourite chair(n)

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The pals celebrate Rachel's 30th birthday and reminisce about their own, including Monica's attempt to hide her intoxication from her parents, and Ross's embarrassing crisis, which resulted in the purchase of a red sports car. programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey tells a fellow soap cast member that her character is to be killed off. programme.desc: A gladiator in the ancient Roman city falls in love with the daughter of a wealthy merchant, who is being forced into marriage with a corrupt senator. When the nearby volcano Vesuvius erupts, he fights to save her and escape the destruction of the city. Disaster movie, starring Kit Harington, Emily Browning, Carrie-Anne Moss and Kiefer Sutherland(n)

programme.title: Greatest Ever Movie Blunders
programme.desc: Comedian Elis James presents a selection of comedy mistakes from some of the best loved films of all time. Capturing movie magic is never easy, as Hollywood's finest cast and crew members know only too well. This array of goofs and clangers by Tinseltown's finest covers Hollywood's golden era through to the modern multiplex blockbusters.(n)

programme.title: Lip Sync Battle UK
programme.desc: Melanie Brown and Professor Green present as fashion model Daisy Lowe and comedian and broadcaster Matt Richardson go head to head lip-synching to hit songs. Their first choice of song is performed in 'civvies', as Mel and the Pro keep it from getting too crazy, but for their second choice Chris and Aston must bring it all to the floor in the form of wigs, costumes and backing dancers. The audience members ultimately decide who performed better, and more than pride is at stake - there is also the chance to walk away with the coveted Lip Sync Battle UK championship belt(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs goes into his favourite diner for a cup of coffee and finds himself staring down the barrel of a gun, forcing him to question choices he has made in the past and present. The action then flashes back a few days to when he and the rest of the team members were investigating the death of a petty officer on board USS Gentry, which has been undergoing repairs in dry dock. The 200th episode of the crime drama, starring Mark Harmon(n)

Her plan involves moving to the big city to be with her partner, fate intervenes when a snowstorm shuts down her local airport and she bumps into a doctor and his daughter. Festive drama, starring Ashley Williams and Teddy Sears(n)

programme.title: Road to Christmas (2018)
programme.desc: A television producer plans to reunite the stars of a popular Christmas show during a live broadcast. Festive romance, starring Jessy Schram and Chad Michael Murray(n)

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey and Ross date the same girl, while Monica fights tooth and nail with a fellow bride-to-be for a special wedding dress and the right to hire Chandler's favourite band for the ceremony. David Schwimmer and Courteney Cox star(n)

programme.title: Party Election Broadcast
programme.desc: By the Brexit Party(n)

programme.title: Britain's Greatest Bridges
programme.desc: For years, London's East End was denied a new bridge because of the need to guarantee passage of ships up and down the Thames. For years, the greatest engineers of the age hunted for a design that would keep both road and water traffic moving. As Rob Bell explains, the solution came from architect Horace Jones, whose revolutionary design, with its thousand-tonne opening sections, was powered by nothing more than water. Rob also explains the bridge was lucky to survive the Second World War, having been a target for German V-1 flying bombs(n)

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Derbyshire's road crime team uses unmarked cars to tail a wanted driver, but as the net closes in he spots a gap and takes off into heavy traffic. In Derby city centre, officers are called in to back up colleagues battling a crowd of bank holiday revellers who have become volatile after closing time, including an alleged gang member carrying a knife(n)

programme.title: Chris Tarrant: Extreme Railway Journeys
programme.desc: The broadcaster returns, beginning by travelling across Europe to examine the train's role in the First World War. In Northumberland, he enjoys a ride on a preserved locomotive to find out how important the railways were to Britain for mobilisation of troops and the operation of large training camps around the country. Aboard a holiday train commandeered to transport troops and ammunition, Chris tells the stories of two opposing soldiers, one English and one German, who both took trains to the Somme in 1916(n)

programme.title: Bouncers
programme.desc: Gaz and Pete help out during Brighton and Hove Pride, trying to back up a colleague who is unable to control the number of people trying to get into his pub, but when they arrive, things go from bad to worse. Meanwhile, Jai must step in and save the day when something goes wrong with the stage lights during a Pride Drag street party(n)

programme.title: Sabotage (2014)
programme.desc: The members of an elite Drug Enforcement Administration team secretly keep the millions of dollars they find during the raid. When they are killed off one by one, the leader becomes convinced one of his men is getting rid of the others to keep all the money, and sets out to expose the murderer. Action thriller, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger and Sam Worthington(n)

programme.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: Dog Days (2012)
programme.desc: Weedy youngster Greg finds his plans for a lazy school holiday ruined when his mother bans video games and his father organises a series of family activities. When he finds out a girl he likes is working at a country club, he tells his family he has a summer job there as an excuse to spend time with her - but struggles to keep up the deception. Family comedy sequel, starring Zachary Gordon and Steve Zahn(n)

programme.title: Angels Sing (2013)
programme.desc: A man is forced to reassess his attitude to Christmas after meeting a cheerful, white-bearded, truck-driving stranger. Family comedy, starring Harry Connick Jr, Connie Britton, Willie Nelson and Chandler Canterbury(n)

programme.title: Epic (2013)
programme.desc: A teenager wanders into a forest that her scientist father believes is home to a race of miniature people. She stumbles on the tiny creatures and is shrunk down to their size so she can carry out a quest to save their new queen from an invading army. Animated adventure, with the voices of Amanda Seyfried, Josh Hutcherson, Colin Farrell and Christoph Waltz(n)

programme.title: Back to the Future (1985)
programme.desc: Teenager Marty McFly travels back to the 1950s in a time machine built by his eccentric inventor friend. The return journey proves tricky enough, but he also accidentally alters the sequence of events that led to his parents falling in love - and has to persuade his future dad to win his mother's heart, or he will never be born. Sci-fi comedy adventure, starring Michael J Fox, Christopher Lloyd, Lea Thompson and Crispin Glover(n)

programme.title: Non-Stop (2014)
programme.desc: An air marshal on a transatlantic flight receives mysterious messages in which an anonymous terrorist threatens to kill one passenger every 20 minutes unless a ransom is paid. He searches the plane for the criminals responsible, but his investigation is threatened when he is framed as being the mastermind behind the plot. Action thriller, starring Liam Neeson, Julianne Moore and Lupita Nyong'o(n)

programme.title: Dirty Grandpa (2016)
programme.desc: An uptight lawyer preparing to marry his boss's controlling daughter and secure a prestigious job is persuaded to drive his fun-loving grandfather to Florida. However, the old man is convinced his grandson is about to make a terrible mistake, and turns the road trip into a wildly hedonistic weekend in the hope of inspiring him to get more fun out of life. Comedy, starring Robert De Niro and Zac Efron(n)

programme.title: Conan the Barbarian (2011)
programme.desc: An evil warlord kills a barbarian chieftain, whose son grows up to be a mighty warrior and seeks revenge for his father's death. He finds there is more at stake, as the tyrant is close to acquiring all the pieces of a magic mask, which will make him all-powerful. Fantasy adventure, with Jason Momoa, Stephen Lang, Ron Perlman and Rose McGowan(n)

programme.title: Dredd (2012)
programme.desc: An uncompromising law enforcer in a post-apocalyptic city is assigned to train a psychic new recruit. A report of three murders leads them to a tower block dominated by a ruthless drug lord, only for the gangster to seal off the building, forcing them to fight their way out. Sci-fi thriller based on the 2000AD comic-strip, starring Karl Urban, Lena Headey and Olivia Thirlby(n)

programme.title: Beneath the Planet of the Apes (1969)
programme.desc: A second astronaut arrives on the strange simian-dominated world searching for his predecessor. As he journeys into the infamous forbidden zone, he discovers an underground cult of psychic mutants. Meanwhile, a military coup has taken place among the ape society, leading to an inevitable battle. Sci-fi sequel, with James Franciscus, Charlton Heston and Kim Hunter(n)

programme.title: The Indian in the Cupboard (1995)
programme.desc: A nine-year-old boy is given an old cupboard and a toy Iroquois Indian for his birthday - but when he puts the figure inside the cupboard, he is astonished to see it come to life. He repeats the experiment with more of his toys, and realises he is creating real people - and is responsible for their wellbeing. Children's fantasy, with Hal Scardino, Litefoot and Steve Coogan(n)

programme.title: Parental Guidance (2012)
programme.desc: A busy mother turns to her parents for help in looking after her three children while she and her husband are working. However, family relations are soon strained to breaking point when it becomes clear that the two generations have very different ideas about childcare. Comedy, with Billy Crystal, Bette Midler and Marisa Tomei(n)

programme.title: The Two Faces of January (2014)
programme.desc: A conman masquerades as a tour guide in Greece, and selects a wealthy American tourist and his younger wife as likely targets. However, when a murder is committed at the couple's hotel, all three are incriminated, and a dangerous alliance develops. Thriller based on Patricia Highsmith's novel, starring Viggo Mortensen, Kirsten Dunst and Oscar Isaac(n)

programme.title: Ender's Game (2013)
programme.desc: In the future, the human race has survived conflict with an alien race, but the prospect of war breaking out again is a constant threat. A gifted boy is selected as a potential military commander for the coming conflict, and subjected to a gruelling training program to prove his worth. Sci-fi adventure based on Orson Scott Card's novel, starring Asa Butterfield, Harrison Ford and Ben Kingsley(n)

programme.title: Jack Reacher: Never Go Back (2016)
programme.desc: The vigilante tries to save an army major who has been framed for murder and treason. He discovers that she has been targeted by a secret government conspiracy, and together they go on the run to expose the truth. Action thriller sequel based on Lee Child's novel, starring Tom Cruise, Cobie Smulders and Danika Yarosh(n)

programme.title: Double Jeopardy (1999)
programme.desc: A man fakes his own death and frames his wife for murder, but after six years in prison she is released. Since the woman has already served her time, she has nothing to lose by really killing him - but her mission of vengeance is complicated by a zealous parole officer determined to stop her. Thriller, starring Ashley Judd, Tommy Lee Jones, Bruce Greenwood and Annabeth Gish(n)

programme.title: Nostalgia (1983)
programme.desc: Russian poet Andrei Gorchakov is accompanied by guide and translator Eugenia as he travels through Italy researching the life of an 18th-century composer. Andrei Tarkovsky's drama, starring Oleg Yankovskiy and Domiziana Giordano. In Russian and Italian(n)

programme.title: In Harm's Way (1965)
programme.desc: Two Navy officers are disgraced in the aftermath of the attack on Pearl Harbour, one for a disastrous engagement with the enemy and the other for a drunken brawl after learning of his wife's death. They get another chance to prove their worth when they are placed in charge of a vital counter-offensive. Second World War drama, starring John Wayne, Kirk Douglas and Henry Fonda(n)

programme.title: Support Your Local Sheriff! (1969)
programme.desc: A drifter in need of money takes the job of sheriff in a small mining outpost, and chooses the town drunk to be his deputy. Events take a chaotic turn when a family of influential crooks decides to pull out all the stops to do away with the lawman. Comedy Western, starring James Garner, Joan Hackett, Jack Elam, Bruce Dern and Walter Brennan(n)

programme.title: How to Murder Your Wife (1965)
programme.desc: A henpecked cartoonist publishes a comic strip depicting the murder of his new wife - who fears he is planning to bump her off for real. When she disappears without trace, he finds himself accused of murder. Comedy, starring Jack Lemmon, Virna Lisi, Terry-Thomas, Claire Trevor, Eddie Mayehoff and Sidney Blackmer(n)

programme.title: The Second Best Exotic Marigold Hotel (2015)
programme.desc: With the original Best Exotic Marigold Hotel a roaring success, owner Sonny decides the time is right to expand his business empire. But to do so, he and the rest of the residents must pull out all the stops to impress a potential investor's inspector - a task that proves to be easier said than done. Comedy drama sequel, with Dev Patel, Maggie Smith, Judi Dench and Richard Gere(n)

programme.title: The Great Wall (2016)
programme.desc: In the 11th-century, some European sets out for China to discover how to make gunpowder. However, on arrival their claims to be on a trading mission are disbelieved and they are arrested and imprisoned by the Nameless Order within the Great Wall - just as it is about to be beset by giant, lizard-like monsters. As wave after wave of attacks and surprise tactics batter the Wall, Europeans and Chinese battle hoards of the alien creatures in a series of escalating conflicts leading to a final confrontation with the alien queen. Fantasy adventure, starring Matt Damon, Willem Dafoe and Tian Jing(n)

programme.title: The Belko Experiment (2016)
programme.desc: Office employees in Colombia are ordered by an unknown voice to take part in a deadly game. Thriller, starring John Gallagher Jr, Adria Arjona, Michael Rooker and Abraham Benrubi(n)
